instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
Good ULIP Returns with Fewer ULIP Charges
A Unit-Linked Insurance Plan or a ULIP may be a useful product for you if you seek life insurance coverage and investment opportunities under one product. It may be considered a unique financial product providing a chance to create wealth while ensuring you a life cover.
For someone familiar with the history of ULIPs, they may have noticed these financial products having undergone changes over the years to appeal to a larger base of investors and policyholders. Over time, ULIPs may have changed to let investors receive good returns and benefits with fewer charges.
Let’s learn about the new type of ULIPs so that you may be able to decide if it's a suitable purchase for you.
Features of New-Age ULIPs: Good Returns with Fewer ULIP Charges
To understand if and how new-age ULIPs may be beneficial for you, let us look at their features:
Possibly fewer charges
ULIP charges may have reduced considerably over the years. This may have helped people look at ULIPs as a viable investment option to meet their life insurance coverage needs.
Usually, you may come across charges such as fund management charges, administration charges, mortality charges, and so on. The kinds of charges may also differ based on the insurer, the policy type, and the features you opt for.
Long-term investment option
New-age ULIPs may be ideal if you are looking for better ULIP returns with fewer charges over a long period. If money is invested for a long time, it may grow substantially because of the principle of compounding. This principle may especially be more beneficial if you have knowledge of the market and have chosen the right fund.
Fund switching option
New-age ULIPs may offer you the benefit of fund switching. With this option, you may switch your investment from one asset class to another depending on your needs and risk appetite. So, you may switch from equity options to debt options and vice versa. Understanding this feature may help you curate the best Unit-Linked Insurance Plan with high returns.
Encouragement of disciplined investment
If you invest in a new-age ULIP, you may have to go through a mandatory lock-in period of 5 years. During this period, you may not be able to withdraw any amount from the plan. This may help you invest in a disciplined manner. Even after the lock-in period ends, it may be wiser to continue investing in the plan as the longer one invests, the higher chances one may have of earning better returns.
Ideal for short-term and long-term goals
While investing for the long term may help you receive good returns, spreading the ULIP charges over the long haul and meet long-term goals, the partial withdrawal feature may help you meet short-term goals as well. Once the lock-in period ends, you may be able to make partial withdrawals from the plan. These partial withdrawals may be carried out within the limits prescribed by the policy wordings.
The money received via partial withdrawals may help you pay for your child’s education, travel, fund small-scale purchases, and so on.
Earning good returns may become even easier if you have an idea of how much you may need to invest today to earn a certain value of returns tomorrow.
How Much Should You Invest in a New-Age ULIP?
How much you are able to invest may depend on your goals, present and future budget limitations, the type of plan you opt for, your investment horizon, and so on. Furthermore, the amount you should be investing may also depend on your risk appetite.
To get a clearer idea of how these factors may affect your returns and how much you should ideally invest, you may take the help of a ULIP calculator. At the same time, remember that investing in the market may come with a certain level of risk. Thus, even though you may try to create the best ULIP with high returns, your money may be subjected to market fluctuations and may bear returns accordingly.
You may want to consult a financial advisor to help you make a decision that may prove to be ideal for you in the long run.
General reference links:
https://www.bajajallianzlife.com/life-insurance-guide/ulip/5-new-age-ulip-benefits.html
https://www.bajajallianzlife.com/life-insurance-guide/ulip/good-ulip-returns-with-ulip-charges.html
https://www.bajajfinservmarkets.in/insurance/ulip/evolution-of-ulips.html
Disclaimer:
IN THIS POLICY, THE INVESTMENT RISK IN INVESTMENT PORTFOLIO IS BORNE BY THE POLICYHOLDER. Investment in ULIPs is subject to risks associated with the capital markets. The policy holder is solely responsible for his/her decisions while investing in ULIPs. The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale.
